title: Fix Model 30 serving reliability failures
description:
From the 2026-05-31 24h CloudWatch service health report.

Evidence:

* /ecs/hokusai-api-development shows 35 Model 30 calls and 4 Model 30 errors.
* Recent error samples: ERROR:src.api.endpoints.model_serving:Technical Task Router MLflow inference failed.
* Recent HTTP samples include POST /api/v1/models/30/predict returning 503 Service Unavailable.

Why this matters:
This is user-facing through the Strategy Explorer path and had roughly an 11% 503 rate in the sampled window.

Acceptance criteria:

* Classify the MLflow inference failures: artifact load, predict call, response normalization, timeout, or MLflow connectivity.
* Add structured context to Model 30 failures: request_id, model_uri/version when available, phase, path_type cold/warm, and exception class/message.
* Confirm whether failures correlate with cold artifact loads or MLflow service errors.
* Add or update tests for the failing path once root cause is known.
